name: avatar
description: User avatar with image, initials fallback, color variants, size presets, and optional badge overlay.

props.name: source
props.description: Image source for the avatar photo; falls back to initials or fallback if omitted or fails to load

props.name: initials
props.description: Text initials displayed when no image is available

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset controlling the avatar diameter

props.name: color
props.description: Background color token used for the initials/fallback circle

props.name: fallback
props.description: Custom fallback content; string shows as text, ReactNode renders directly

props.name: badge
props.description: Optional badge content positioned at the bottom-right of the avatar
